title: Spryzeen's Improved Fast Leaves
body:
# Spryzeen's Improved Fast Leaves
![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wl3LkHJ7/images/1d6e27f64584b648e77b3dea65e5c68593d6d9ce.png)

Improved Fast Leaves provides a detailed background to all leaves while optimizing performance.
There are literally leaves under those leaves.

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Full vanilla texture pack, you don't need any mod or something.
- Optimized perfomance (It's almost like leaves from fast graphics).
- Support all vanilla leaves.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- None!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- None!

</details>
